report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides (Lido V3 stVaults, Institutional Crypto Adoption) for UX issues, verified OG images, and implemented mobile responsiveness + keyboard accessibility fixes across both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed heading line-height from 1.2 to 1.3 on both pages for better readability (WCAG heading spacing)
Converted fixed 2-column grids (1fr 1fr) to responsive auto-fit grids (repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))) — 2 grids on Lido page, 3 grids on Institutional page
Added keyboard focus indicators (boxShadow ring) to FAQ summary elements on both pages — users tabbing through FAQs now see visible focus state
Added onFocus/onBlur handlers to Related Reading links on Institutional page to mirror hover visual feedback for keyboard users

Identified 12 total UX issues across severity levels: 2 High (keyboard focus, mobile grids), 4 Medium (link underlines, color contrast, inline styles, FAQ focus), 4 Low (skip link, icon labels, line height, breadcrumb context)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image verified: og-lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026.svg (1200x630, 9.4KB) — features stVaults architecture diagram with Validator/DeFi/Restaking/Institutional nodes, $15B+ TVL stat cards, brand gradient accent bar

OG image verified: og-institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026.svg (1200x630, 12.2KB) — features Wall Street building visualization (BlackRock/JPMorgan/M.Stanley/SEC-CFTC), $35.6B RWA stat cards, key bullet points
Both OG images follow degen0x design system: dark gradient background, brand accent bar, logo placement, Inter typography, glass-morphism stat cards

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026 — 1,155 lines, DeFi staking guide with TOC, comparison tables, FAQ section
/learn/institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026 — 1,458 lines, market analysis guide with Wall Street data, ETF products, regulatory framework

sections.title: Remaining Polish Backlog
items: Add skip-to-main-content link for keyboard navigation (low priority)
Add aria-hidden to decorative emoji icons (low priority)
Test badge contrast against WCAG AA standards (medium priority)
Consider adding link underlines for WCAG 1.4.1 compliance (medium priority)
